case_title: ERNESTO LARDIZABAL ET AL VS. CARLOS SUNCIN ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,830.89 FILED BY LARDIZABAL, ERNESTO LARDIZABAL, EPIFANIA G AS TO DEFENDANT SUNCIN, CARLOS SUNCIN, DINAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-23-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-06-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-28-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFFS ERNESTO & EPIFANIA LARDIZABAL, AND DEFENDANTS CARLOS & DINAH SUNCIN. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NEXT CALLING, THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF ERNESTO LARDIZABAL, WHO WAS PRESENT AT TODAY'S HEARING. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF EPIFANIA LARDIZABEL OR DEFENDANTS CARLOS SUNCIN & DINAH SUNCIN. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
